# Beyond the Cosmic Horizon
## Scripture
"The heavens declare the glory of God; the skies proclaim the work of his hands." - Psalm 19:1

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we're reminded of the vastness and complexity of God's creation. The stars, galaxies, and nebulas stretch out before us like an endless canvas, each one a testament to God's incredible power and creativity. Yet, despite the incredible distances and mysteries of the universe, we're not just small, insignificant specks in the grand scheme. We're beloved children of God, created in His image and endowed with a deep sense of purpose and meaning. As we explore the depths of space, we're drawn closer to the heart of our Creator, who whispers words of love and affirmation to us through the language of the stars.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the wonders of Your creation, we're filled with awe and gratitude for the gift of life and the beauty of the universe. Help us to see beyond the cosmic horizon, to the infinite love and wisdom that lies behind it all. May we be inspired by the majesty of Your creation to live lives that reflect Your glory, and to trust in Your guiding hand as we navigate the journey of faith. Thank You for the stars, which remind us of Your promises and Your presence in our lives. Amen.
